display.purpose: Modal headings only — the largest text in the app.

title.purpose: Topbar title, workspace names, pane titles.

body.purpose: Settings text, menu items, dialog copy.

micro.purpose: Uppercase section headers and badges, one per panel.

terminal.purpose: All PTY output and anything copy-pasted as a command. The voice of the machine.

shadows.name: pane-rest
shadows.purpose: The only resting shadow — separation between panes and the app background.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogs over the dimmed, blurred backdrop.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Token --focus-ring. Keyboard :focus-visible halo on every interactive element, plus :focus on text inputs — zinc, never a colored glow; pointer focus never shows it.

zIndex.name: pane-overlay
zIndex.purpose: Pane-local: exit overlay, topmost inside a pane.

zIndex.name: modal-backdrop
zIndex.purpose: Token --z-modal-backdrop. Dimmed blur layer; the modal itself stacks inside it.

accessibility.focusVisible: Every interactive element (buttons, icon buttons, inputs, sidebar rows, context-menu items, toggles, agent-picker options, settings nav) shows box-shadow: var(--focus-ring) on :focus-visible only — mouse clicks never flash the ring. Text inputs keep a :focus treatment (border #71717a + halo).
accessibility.contrast: Audited 2026-07: --text-faint #5b5b64 measures 2.83/2.76/2.66:1 against bg/bg-sidebar/bg-panel (fails 4.5:1); candidate #6e6e78 still failed (3.77/3.68/3.54:1). Essential text (paths, branches, timestamps, placeholders, counters, section titles, hints) moved to --text-muted #8e8e96 (5.84/5.70/5.50:1 — passes AA). --text-faint survives only on icon glyphs at rest.
accessibility.reducedMotion: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) and the .reduce-motion class collapse all animation/transition durations to 0.01ms, covering every animation including the ctx-meter transform transition.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Token --ease-out. Entrances, FLIP grid moves, modals, popovers, ctx meter.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Token --dur-press. Button compress to scale(0.97) on :active.

motion.name: ctx-meter
motion.purpose: Context-usage fill: transform scaleX transition — compositor-only, no layout thrash.

motion.name: flip-grid
motion.purpose: Grid reflow on spawn/close via FLIP transform animation (structure changes only — the grid is static otherwise: no resize, no reorder).

components.name: Default Button
components.description: The workhorse control — elevated slate, hairline border, compresses on press.
components.css: .ds-btn { font: inherit; font-size: 13px; line-height: 14px; color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); background: var(--bg-elevated, #1d1d22); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #34343c); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease, transform 0.08s ease; } .ds-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #232329); border-color: #40404a; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 122, 0.18); } .ds-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal White inverted primary — one per screen, never a hue.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #111113; background: var(--accent, #fafafa); border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, transform 0.08s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d4d4d8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Transparent at rest, murmur icon, hover wash — topbar and pane-header actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" title="Notifications"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6 8a6 6 0 0 1 12 0c0 7 3 9 3 9H3s3-2 3-9"/><path d="M10.3 21a1.94 1.94 0 0 0 3.4 0"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 26px; height: 24px; color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, color 0.14s ease; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #232329); color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); } .ds-icon-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: App-black field with zinc halo focus — modals and inline rename.
components.css: .ds-input { font: inherit; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); background: var(--bg, #101013); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #34343c); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.14s ease, box-shadow 0.14s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #71717a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 122, 0.18); }

components.name: Workspace Sidebar Item
components.description: One workspace row — name, branch, running dot; active gets elevated fill and strong border.
components.html:
terra-swarm
main · 3 agents
components.css: .ds-ws-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease, border-color 0.14s ease; } .ds-ws-item:hover { background: var(--bg-elevated, #1d1d22); } .ds-ws-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 122, 0.18); } .ds-ws-item.active { background: var(--bg-elevated, #1d1d22); border-color: var(--border-strong, #34343c); } .ds-ws-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green, #4ade80); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-ws-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); } .ds-ws-meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); }

components.name: Terminal Pane
components.description: The product — terminal-black body, panel-slate header, focused ring, agent badge, context meter.
components.html:
clauderefactor auth module42%
$ claude --resume
● running
components.css: .ds-pane { background: var(--terminal-bg, #0c0c0e); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26262c); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); min-width: 240px; transition: border-color 0.14s ease, box-shadow 0.14s ease; } .ds-pane.focused { box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 1px #52525b; } .ds-pane-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--bg-panel, #17171b); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #26262c); padding: 6px 8px 6px 14px; } .ds-pane-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #e0a35c; background: #38291f; border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-pane-title { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); flex: 1; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-pane-ctx { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); } .ds-pane-ctx-bar { width: 34px; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--bg-hover, #232329); overflow: hidden; } .ds-pane-ctx-fill { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--green, #4ade80); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-pane-body { font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, Monaco, 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.35; color: #d4d4d8; padding: 8px 10px; }

components.name: Agent Badge
components.description: Per-agent identity tint — the only place brand hues are allowed.
components.html: claude codex opencode kimi
components.css: .ds-agent-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; color: #e0a35c; background: #38291f; } .ds-agent-badge.codex { color: #5bc0b8; background: #1e3336; } .ds-agent-badge.opencode { color: #8fbf6f; background: #22331f; } .ds-agent-badge.kimi { color: #b39ddb; background: #2e2542; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: 38×22 pill — hover slate off, running green on, 120ms knob travel.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position: relative; width: 38px; height: 22px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--bg-hover, #232329); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #34343c); cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-toggle.on { background: var(--green, #4ade80); border-color: var(--green, #4ade80); } .ds-toggle-knob { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--text, #e4e4e7); transition: transform 120ms ease, background 120ms ease; } .ds-toggle.on .ds-toggle-knob { transform: translateX(16px); background: #18181b; }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Panel-slate card over dimmed, blurred backdrop — spawn and settings flows only.
components.html:
New agent

Pick an agent to spawn in this workspace.
components.css: .ds-modal { background: var(--bg-panel, #17171b); border: 1px solid var(--border, #26262c); border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; width: 420px; max-width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.55); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; } .ds-modal-title { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); } .ds-modal-copy { margin: 0; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted, #8e8e96); } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; } .ds-modal-btn { font: inherit; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text, #e4e4e7); background: var(--bg-elevated, #1d1d22); border: 1px solid var(--border-strong, #34343c); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.14s ease; } .ds-modal-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-hover, #232329); } .ds-modal-btn.primary { background: var(--accent, #fafafa); color: #111113; font-weight: 600; border: none; } .ds-modal-btn.primary:hover { background: #d4d4d8; }

narrative.overview:
Terra Swarm is a dark, dense control room that has learned to keep its mouth shut. The aesthetic is Warp's seriousness applied to a fleet of agents: a near-black zinc palette, terminal-grade typography, and chrome so restrained it registers only when it carries state. Nothing on screen is decorative; every pixel either is agent output or says something true about an agent right now.

The system explicitly rejects IDE chrome overload — toolbars, panels, and ornamentation competing with the terminals for attention. Depth is tonal, not shadowed. Color is a status vocabulary, not a brand wash: green means running, amber means attention, red means failure, and the only "accent" is a white button. Motion is fast (140–250ms) and exists solely to convey state change.

Density is a feature. This is a tool its user opens at the start of a session and leaves open all day; it should feel like a well-made instrument, not a presentation.
keyCharacteristics: Terminal grid is the product; chrome recedes to 38px topbar, 24px statusbar, one sidebar.
Near-black zinc surfaces, layered tonally — no hue in the neutrals.
White-on-dark inverted primary button; the interface has no brand color.
Green / amber / red used exclusively as live agent state.
Two type voices: system sans for chrome, SF Mono for anything the machine said.
Flat at rest; shadows exist only on layers floating above the grid.

rules.name: The Inverted Primary Rule
rules.body: The loudest action on any screen is a white button, never a hue. Terra Swarm has no brand color in the UI; identity comes from restraint, not pigment.

rules.name: The Three-Word Rule
rules.body: Saturated color says exactly one of three things — green: running, amber: attention, red: failed. Using green, amber, or red for anything else (branding, decoration, categorization) is forbidden. Agent identity colors are the only exception, and they appear only on agent badges.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Chrome speaks the system sans; the machine speaks SF Mono. If text is a command, path the user runs, or agent output, it is mono. Nothing else is.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: No fluid type, no clamp(), no responsive font sizes. The scale is fixed at 10 / 11 / 12 / 13 / 16px and nothing in between — the former 12.5px (context-menu items) and 9px (bell badge) offenders are converged to 12px and 10px. Chrome renders with -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; numeric meters and counters always use tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Floating-Only Rule
rules.body: If a surface doesn't float, it gets no shadow. Resting cards, sidebar items, and list rows are tonal, not shadowed.

dos: Do let the terminal grid own the window — chrome earns pixels only by carrying state (notification, context usage, git branch), per PRODUCT.md.

Do keep transitions on the motion tokens — --dur-hover (140ms) for control state, --dur-press (80ms) for the button handshake, --dur-med (200ms) with --ease-out (cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)) for entrances; motion conveys state, nothing else.
Do use the fixed type scale (10 / 11 / 12 / 13 / 16px) and the two voices exactly as defined.
Do express every interactive component in all its states: default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled. Keyboard focus always has the zinc halo; pointer focus never does.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — the app ships a global reduce path; every new animation joins it.
Do keep contrast at WCAG AA minimum against the dark surfaces — check, don't assume. Essential text never dips below Murmur (5.2:1 worst case); Whisper is for decorative rests only.
donts: Don't ship IDE chrome overload — PRODUCT.md's named anti-reference: toolbars, panels, or ornamentation that compete with agent output instead of serving it.
Don't introduce a brand hue into the UI. No colored primary buttons, no gradient anything, no tinted neutrals outside the zinc scale.
Don't use green, amber, or red decoratively — the Three-Word Rule is absolute.
Don't add resting shadows to non-floating surfaces, or glow/ring effects beyond the single #52525b focused-pane ring and the zinc --focus-ring halo.
Don't use a display font, a second sans, or fluid typography anywhere in chrome.
Don't gate content on entrance animations; panes and lists are visible by default, motion only enhances.
Don't reach for a modal as a first thought — inline and progressive disclosure first; modals are for spawning and settings, not workflow.
